This material event contains a "Less than Cat 3" level of radioactive material.

Event Text

AGREEMENT STATE REPORT - STOLEN MOISTURE DENSITY GAUGE

The following report was received from the State of California via email:

"On February 20, 2019, the RSO of G3SoilWorks, Inc. contacted the California Office of Emergency Services about a moisture density gauge that was stolen."

Facility: LASALLE

2 N N 0 Refueling 0 Refueling

Event Text

SPECIFIED SYSTEM ACTUATION - TRIP OF SAFETY RELATED BUS

On February 28, 2019, at 2217 CST, LaSalle Unit 2 experienced a trip of the 241Y Safety Related Bus during surveillance testing.
